---
title: "Blog"
description: "Occasional notes on food economics, the environment, and the evidence behind the headlines."

listing:
  - id: posts
    contents: "posts/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description, categories]
    categories: true
    feed: true

page-layout: full
include-back-link: false
toc: false
---

:::{#posts}
:::
